title: Invoice a Sales Order
navigation: Navigate to Customers > Sales > Invoice Sales Orders .
steps: Click Refreshuntil the Submission Status is Complete. Verify there arezero errors.
Click Complete hyperlink in the Submission Status column.
Verify the invoice was created from the sales order number noted in step 3.
Click the Actionsdropdown list from the invoice header and select GL Impact . Review
